title: Onboarding - Animations
scenario: Verify animations are functional on all onboarding screens including initial setup loading screens and the 'Well hello, first thing first...', 'Up-to-Date', 'Personal', and 'Organized' screens.
steps: Launch the application and observe the initial setup loading screen for any animations.
Proceed to the 'Well hello, first thing first...' screen and verify that all animations (transitions, loading indicators, etc.) are functioning correctly.
Navigate to the 'Up-to-Date' screen and check that all animations are playing as expected.
Navigate to the 'Personal' screen and confirm that animations are working properly.
Navigate to the 'Organized' screen and ensure all animations are functional.
expected: All animations on the initial setup loading screen and the 'Well hello, first thing first...', 'Up-to-Date', 'Personal', and 'Organized' screens play smoothly and are fully functional.
